evidence: "Great film! It's one of those that needs to be watched more than once to pick up the fine details of the story and characters."
"Awesome film. Wish they would of made more..."
"What a series! Slight departure from the books, but this series is awesome!"
"Well done cinematography, and great story. Good film!"
"Excellent film! As is all the other films."
"Been a Max fan since the original came out in theatres years ago."
"Mr. Tolkien I think had a big hand in their making."
"Great film, very good sequel to the first film."
"May not be a real person but what they did and went thru and lived helps show us what it probably was like..."
"Enjoyed this film since I first saw it as a youngster in the 70's. Understand it more as an adult."

summary: The user has a strong preference for fantasy, action, and animation genres, appreciating both the storytelling and production quality. They enjoy fast-paced narratives with high emotional resonance, indicating a taste for engaging and immersive experiences.
